response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) and a university thesis project, far short of the 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows required. There is no SQL Server/Oracle experience and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain exposure. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang on Linux-oriented systems, which does not align with the role's mandatory requirements.
strengths: Strong general software engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Excellent communication evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching engagements
Broad polyglot experience including some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ development on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work is MongoDB/MySQL-centric
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain background
